title: Replace Expand/Collapse Buttons with Single Toggle
story: As a DataTools Pro user viewing an ERD, I want a single toggle button instead of separate expand and collapse buttons, so that the toolbar is cleaner and the interaction is more intuitive.
description:
## Context
The ERD toolbar had two separate buttons for expand and collapse (MBT-112). This uses extra space and is less intuitive than a single toggle.

## Behavior
The two buttons are replaced with a single toggle that switches between expanded (showing fields) and contracted (object names only) states.
acceptance_criteria: A single toggle button replaces the two expand/collapse buttons
Toggle switches between expanded and contracted ERD views
Toggle button visually indicates the current state
Toolbar is visually cleaner with the single control
ux_changes: Replaced separate expand and collapse toolbar buttons with a single toggle button that switches between detailed and conceptual views.
implementation_notes: Simple UX refinement: consolidate two buttons into one toggle that tracks and swaps the current expand/collapse state.
